rules.rule: Do not memoize (useMemo, useCallback, React.memo) by default — only when a measured problem exists.
Do not create large objects or functions inline inside hot render paths.
Avoid oversized components — split large render trees at natural responsibility boundaries.
Avoid unnecessary context updates — split contexts by update frequency.
Bundle size increases must be reviewed before adding a dependency.
Lazy-load route-level features when bundle impact is meaningful — use React.lazy + Suspense.
